label: plain_text
text:
It
is
important
to
keep
in
mind
that
mathematics
aims to not
just
find
out
what
patterns
exist, but also
the
explanations
for
why
they
exist.
Such
explanations
can
often then be used in applications well beyond the context in
which they
discovered,
then help
which
can
ptor
were
propel
humanity forward.
